2026/05/17 23:22:55.145374843 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145380894 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145416080 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145417272 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145434075 {
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145441157 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145442108 new <- list()
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145464731 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145484047 new$width <- width
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145496881 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145497462 new$height <- height

2026/05/17 23:22:55.145506619 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/05/17 23:22:55.145515596 new$title <- title

2026/05/17 23:22:55.145524202 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145532387 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145534351 new$version <- version
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145554158 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145555600 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145570177 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145571170 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145587049 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145588101 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145596529 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145606926 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145607748 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145621794 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145622275 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145631412 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145631833 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145648744 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145649165 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145658402 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145658823 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145667900 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145668321 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145677348 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145677769 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145687707 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145691895 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145711532 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145712494 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145727283 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145737490 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145738522 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145783177 "default"))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145784229 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145792986 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145793406 }
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145801291 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145801812 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145812232 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145812662 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145849161 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145881331 }
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145888803 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145889774 }
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145903821 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145904873 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145915743 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145916284 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145926213 domain = NA)
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145926663 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145935530 }
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145935961 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145944427 old$family <- family
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145945659 }
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145961048 version <- old$version
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145962100 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145978961 "2.0")
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145979853 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145993769 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/17 23:22:55.145994670 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146011853 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146012804 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146023014 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146023484 domain = NA)
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146032962 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146033453 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146044934 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146045505 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146057488 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/17 23:22:55.146057909 invisible()
